A trailer included in the enhanced CD single of "Jesus Freak" advertised a September 17, 1995 theatrical release date for the film. It was never released to theaters, as it could not find a distributor. Eight years after the film was to be released theatrically, the movie was finally released on DVD in unfinished form. Jeepers Creepers (1939 animated film) Jeepers Creepers is a 1939 "Looney Tunes" animated short starring Porky Pig. It was directed by Robert Clampett. It was released on DVD on September 19, 2017, in the "Porky Pig 101". Porky is a police officer, who is in a police car that is named 6 7/8. He gets a call from his chief to go investigate goings-on at a haunted house. The house is haunted to the core, and the fun loving ghost plays a series of pranks on the unsuspecting pig. baseline.final_answer: The animated film "Jeepers Creepers" was released on September 19, 2017, as part of the "Porky Pig 101" DVD collection. Another film based on "Creepy Crawlers" is in development with Paramount Pictures, announced in May 2018.

evaluation.feedback: The answer contains factual claims about release dates but lacks any citations. Therefore, it is not grounded in the provided documents.
